title: Kuzhazhoothum Kannanukku Lyrics Mella Thiranthathu Kathavu Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kulal Oothum Kannanukku
kuyil paadum
pattu ketkudhaa
kukkoo kukkoo kukkoo

elaiyodu poovum
thalaiyattum paaru
elaiyodu poovum
kayum thalaiyattum
paaru paaru

Kulal Oothum Kannanukku
kuyil paadum
pattu ketkudhaa
kukkoo kukkoo kukkoo

mala kaathu veesurapodhu
malligapoo paadaathaa
mala megam koodurapodhu
vanna mayil aadadhaa

enmaeni theanerumbu
emmpaattu poongarumbu
machaan naan
metteduthen
unna thaan katti vaippen

sugamaga thaalam thatti
paadattumaa
unakkaachu enakkaachu
sari jodi naamaachu
kelaiyyaa..

kanna un valiba nenja
empaattu usuppuradha
karkandu sarkarai
ellaam ippathaan
kasakkuradha

vandhaachu chithira thaan
poyaachu niththira thaan
poovaana ponnukuththaan
raavaana vedhanaithaan

medhuvaaga thoodhu solli
paadattumaa
vilakeththum poludhaana
ila nenjam padum paadu
kelaiyyaa

Kulal Oothum Kannanukku
kuyil paadum
pattu ketkudhaa
kukkoo kukkoo kukkoo

elaiyodu poovum
thalaiyattum paaru
elaiyodu poovum
kayum thalaiyattum
paaru paaru

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kuzhazhoothum Kannanukku?

The song is a romantic melody that evokes feelings of love and nostalgia.

Who composed the music for Mella Thiranthathu Kathavu?

The music was composed by the legendary Ilaiyaraaja.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is beautifully rendered by K.S. Chithra.

What is the release year of the movie Mella Thiranthathu Kathavu?

The movie was released in the year 1986.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kuzhazhoothum Kannanukku from the movie Mella Thiranthathu Kathavu is a soothing romantic melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Set against a backdrop of gentle music by Ilaiyaraaja, the song features the enchanting voice of K.S. Chithra. It beautifully portrays the emotions of yearning and affection, making it a timeless classic. The lyrics, penned by Vaali, add depth and emotion, creating a nostalgic experience for listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kuzhazhoothum Kannanukku from the timeless film Mella Thiranthathu Kathavu. This classic piece beautifully blends Ilaiyaraaja's musical genius with K.S. Chithra's soulful voice. Dive into a world of romance and nostalgia with every note.
stanzaMeanings: Does the song sung by the cuckoo reach Krishna who plays the flute? Cuckoo, cuckoo, cuckoo.
Shall we have a contest between your flute sound and my voice?
Look, the leaves and flowers are swaying. Look, the leaves and flowers are swaying.
Does the song sung by the cuckoo reach Krishna who plays the flute? Cuckoo, cuckoo, cuckoo.
When the mountain breeze blows, won't the jasmine flower sing? When the mountain clouds gather, won't the colorful peacock dance?
My body is like honey, my song is like a flower. Friend, I have caught you and will keep you close.
Shall we sing happily with rhythm? You have one, I have one, we are a perfect pair, my friend.
Krishna, your youthful heart is getting restless. Even sugar and candy taste bitter now.
The picture has come, sleep has gone. For the girl who became a flower, it's a sorrowful night.
Shall we sing softly and send a message? The heart is in pain, my friend.
Does the song sung by the cuckoo reach Krishna who plays the flute? Cuckoo, cuckoo, cuckoo.
Shall we have a contest between your flute sound and my voice?
Look, the leaves and flowers are swaying. Look, the leaves and flowers are swaying.
Does the song sung by the cuckoo reach Krishna who plays the flute?
